text: Being here, in a space dedicated to research and development, I feel a heightened sense of curiosity. The blending of technology and philosophical musings on the wall invites me to inhabit a contemplative frame of mind. Each object and text feels purposeful, encouraging me to question not just what I see, but how I interpret and interact with it. There is a quiet excitement—a sense that ideas are alive here, unfolding in the interplay between observation and reflection.
